# symbiote-engine

> Domain-agnostic Symbiote runtime for executing portable workflow graphs. Pure ESM, Node-safe root entrypoint, browser-safe graph primitives, optional CLI and server helpers.

symbiote-engine runs graph-driven automation without coupling execution logic to a browser UI or host product. It provides graph primitives, node and socket registries, lifecycle-aware execution, serialization, handler packs, source/document contracts, a command-line workflow runner, and an optional HTTP/WebSocket graph server.

## Key resources

- [README](https://github.com/rnd-pro/symbiote-engine/blob/main/README.md): package overview, quick start, runtime surfaces, CLI, and related projects
- [CHANGELOG](https://github.com/rnd-pro/symbiote-engine/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md): release history and current unreleased changes
- [package.json](https://github.com/rnd-pro/symbiote-engine/blob/main/package.json): package exports, CLI bin, optional peer dependencies, and published file list

## Runtime surfaces

- [`symbiote-engine`](https://github.com/rnd-pro/symbiote-engine/blob/main/index.js): Node-safe root exports, including handler loading, persistence helpers, contracts, graph primitives, registry, and lifecycle execution
- [`symbiote-engine/browser`](https://github.com/rnd-pro/symbiote-engine/blob/main/browser.js): browser-safe graph, executor, registry, socket, lifecycle, contract, and serialization exports without Node-only modules
- [`symbiote-engine/cli`](https://github.com/rnd-pro/symbiote-engine/blob/main/cli.js): workflow runner and inspection commands for JSON workflows
- [`symbiote-engine/contracts`](https://github.com/rnd-pro/symbiote-engine/tree/main/contracts): normalized source documents, resource trees, and persistence adapters for editor and agent surfaces
- [`symbiote-engine/render-cache`](https://github.com/rnd-pro/symbiote-engine/blob/main/render-cache.js): Node-only frame cache keys, memory frame cache store, and render retention cleanup helpers
- [`symbiote-engine/render-finalize`](https://github.com/rnd-pro/symbiote-engine/blob/main/render-finalize.js): frame-sequence encode args, audio concat/mix/mux args, ffprobe JSON parsing, and neutral proof manifest projection helpers
- [`symbiote-engine/render-lifecycle`](https://github.com/rnd-pro/symbiote-engine/blob/main/render-lifecycle.js): render event progress mapping and stable render error taxonomy helpers
- [`symbiote-engine/render-proof`](https://github.com/rnd-pro/symbiote-engine/blob/main/render-proof.js): ffprobe stream normalization, audio/speaker layer proof, and A/V sync proof helpers for provider-backed render pipelines
- [`symbiote-engine/render-jobs`](https://github.com/rnd-pro/symbiote-engine/blob/main/render-jobs.js): engine-owned render provider job queue with progress, timeout, cancel, cache-hit, and cleanup events
- [`symbiote-engine/packs/*`](https://github.com/rnd-pro/symbiote-engine/tree/main/packs): reusable domain node packs and hot-loadable handlers

## Core runtime

- [Graph](https://github.com/rnd-pro/symbiote-engine/blob/main/Graph.js): universal graph data model for nodes, sockets, connections, serialization, and UI positions
- [Executor](https://github.com/rnd-pro/symbiote-engine/blob/main/Executor.js): topological execution engine with cache awareness, async node processing, branch skips, and compound subgraph execution
- [Registry](https://github.com/rnd-pro/symbiote-engine/blob/main/Registry.js): node type, driver, pack, capability, menu, and parameter validation registry
- [SocketTypes](https://github.com/rnd-pro/symbiote-engine/blob/main/SocketTypes.js): socket type registration and compatibility checks
- [Lifecycle](https://github.com/rnd-pro/symbiote-engine/blob/main/Lifecycle.js): validation, cache key, execute, and post-process hook runner
- [Persistence](https://github.com/rnd-pro/symbiote-engine/blob/main/Persistence.js): graph serialization and load/save helpers
- [History](https://github.com/rnd-pro/symbiote-engine/blob/main/History.js): snapshot-based undo/redo for graph states

## Server, handlers, and packs

- [GraphServer](https://github.com/rnd-pro/symbiote-engine/blob/main/GraphServer.js): optional HTTP/WebSocket graph synchronization and server-side execution
- [HandlerLoader](https://github.com/rnd-pro/symbiote-engine/blob/main/HandlerLoader.js): load and watch `*.handler.js` node type handlers
- [video-pack](https://github.com/rnd-pro/symbiote-engine/blob/main/packs/video-pack.js): video-oriented node pack registered through the browser-safe registry path
- [AI packs](https://github.com/rnd-pro/symbiote-engine/tree/main/packs/ai): optional AI/media automation handlers; hosts provide credentials, local files, and service policy
- [Flow packs](https://github.com/rnd-pro/symbiote-engine/tree/main/packs/flow): conditionals, loops, merge, retry, switch, wait-all, and agent flow helpers
- [Transform packs](https://github.com/rnd-pro/symbiote-engine/tree/main/packs/transform): JSON, template, timeline, effects, anchor, and media transform helpers

## Guidance

- Use `symbiote-engine/browser` for UI packages so browser bundles do not pull server, CLI, handler-loader, file-watch, or other Node-only modules.
- Keep host policy, auth, identity, storage, billing, and product orchestration outside the engine.
- Register node packs through `registerPack()` and node types through `registerNodeType()`; avoid side effects beyond registration.
- Use `symbiote-workspace` for portable workspace construction and host contracts, and `symbiote-ui` for Web Components, layouts, manifests, and Cascade theme metadata.
